title: Robin Rodrigue
compiled_truth: Robin Rodrigue is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1980-01-01 to 2002-03-21), Robin Rodrigue sent 1455 and received 259 emails, totalling 1714 interactions. Top correspondents: [Gabriel Monroy](people/gabriel-monroy) (477), [Kori Loibl](people/kori-loibl) (144), [Becky Pitre](people/becky-pitre) (124), [Kathy Reeves](people/kathy-reeves) (78), [Nicole Laporte](people/nicole-laporte) (64).
